---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="gallery-hero">
  <div class="gallery-hero-inner">
    <h2 class="gallery-hero-title">Gallery</h2>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="gallery-grid-container reveal">
  <div style="padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center;">
    <h3 class="section-title" style="margin: 0; font-size: 1.8rem; color: #333;">Covid Pandemic Mask Distributor in Balotra, Rajasthan through VSSK</h3>
  </div>
    
  <div class="row g-0">
    <!-- Gallery Item 1 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g1.jpeg" alt="Covid Relief Work">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Covid Relief Work</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
      
    <!-- Gallery Item 2 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g2.jpeg" alt="Mask Distribution">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Mask Distribution</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
      
    <!-- Gallery Item 3 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g3.jpeg" alt="Community Support">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Community Support</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 4 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g4.jpeg" alt="Pandemic Relief">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Pandemic Relief</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 5 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g5.jpeg" alt="VSSK Initiative">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>VSSK Initiative</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 6 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g6.jpeg" alt="Balotra Outreach">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Balotra Outreach</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

      <!-- Gallery Item 7 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g7.jpeg" alt="Field Work">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Field Work</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 8 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g8.jpeg" alt="Safety Awareness">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Safety Awareness</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 9 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g9.jpeg" alt="Community Care">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Community Care</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 10 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g10.jpeg" alt="Relief Distribution">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Relief Distribution</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 11 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g11.jpeg" alt="Helping Hands">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Helping Hands</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 12 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g12.jpeg" alt="Social Service">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Social Service</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 13 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g13.jpeg" alt="Team VSSK">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Team VSSK</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 14 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g14.jpeg" alt="Rural Support">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>Rural Support</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gallery Item 15 -->
    <div class="col-lg-3 col-md-4 col-sm-6">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="images/g15.jpeg" alt="VSSK Impact">
        <div class="gallery-caption">
          <h5>VSSK Impact</h5>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
      
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Lightbox Modal -->
<div id="vssLightbox" class="lightbox-modal">
  <div class="lightbox-progress"></div>
  <span class="close-lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">&times;</span>
  <a class="lightbox-prev" onclick="changeSlide(-1)">&#10094;</a>
  <a class="lightbox-next" onclick="changeSlide(1)">&#10095;</a>
  <img class="lightbox-content" id="lightboxImg">
  <div id="lightboxCaption" class="lightbox-caption"></div>
  <div id="photoCounter" class="photo-counter"></div>
  <div class="lightbox-thumbs" id="lightboxThumbs"></div>
</div>

<script>
  // Reveal Animation on Scroll
  function reveal() {
    var reveals = document.querySelectorAll(".reveal");
    for (var i = 0; i < reveals.length; i++) {
      var windowHeight = window.innerHeight;
      var elementTop = reveals[i].getBoundingClientRect().top;
      var elementVisible = 150;
      if (elementTop < windowHeight - elementVisible) {
        reveals[i].classList.add("active");
      }
    }
  }
  window.addEventListener("scroll", reveal);
  reveal();

  // Lightbox Logic
  let galleryImages = [];
  let currentIndex = 0;
  let modal, modalImg, captionText, counterText, thumbsContainer;

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    modal = document.getElementById("vssLightbox");
    modalImg = document.getElementById("lightboxImg");
    captionText = document.getElementById("lightboxCaption");
    counterText = document.getElementById("photoCounter");
    thumbsContainer = document.getElementById("lightboxThumbs");

    // Collect all gallery images
    const images = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-item img');
    
    images.forEach((img, index) => {
      img.style.cursor = "zoom-in";
      
      // Get caption
      let caption = "";
      const captionDiv = img.nextElementSibling;
      if(captionDiv && captionDiv.classList.contains('gallery-caption')) {
         caption = captionDiv.querySelector('h5').innerText;
      } else {
         caption = img.alt;
      }

      // Store in array
      galleryImages.push({
        src: img.src,
        caption: caption
      });

      // Create thumbnail
      const thumb = document.createElement("img");
      thumb.src = img.src;
      thumb.className = "lightbox-thumb";
      thumb.onclick = function() { openLightbox(index); };
      thumbsContainer.appendChild(thumb);

      // Click event
      img.onclick = function() {
        openLightbox(index);
      }
    });

    // Close on Escape key
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
      if (event.key === "Escape" && modal.style.display === "flex") {
        closeLightbox();
      }
      // Arrow keys navigation
      if (modal.style.display === "flex") {
        if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") {
          changeSlide(-1);
        } else if (event.key === "ArrowRight") {
          changeSlide(1);
        }
      }
    });

    // Close when clicking outside image
    modal.onclick = function(event) {
      if (event.target === modal || event.target === thumbsContainer) {
        closeLightbox();
      }
    }
  });

  function openLightbox(index) {
    currentIndex = index;
    if(modal) modal.style.display = "flex";
    showSlide(currentIndex);
  }

  function closeLightbox() {
    if(modal) modal.style.display = "none";
  }

  function changeSlide(n) {
    currentIndex += n;
    if (currentIndex >= galleryImages.length) {
      currentIndex = 0;
    } else if (currentIndex < 0) {
      currentIndex = galleryImages.length - 1;
    }
    showSlide(currentIndex);
  }

  function showSlide(index) {
    const image = galleryImages[index];
    
    // Update main image with fade effect
    if(modalImg) {
      modalImg.style.opacity = 0;
      setTimeout(() => {
        modalImg.src = image.src;
        modalImg.style.opacity = 1;
      }, 50);
    }
    
    if(captionText) captionText.innerText = image.caption;
    
    // Update Photo Counter
    if(counterText) {
      counterText.innerText = (index + 1) + " / " + galleryImages.length;
    }

    // Update Thumbnails
    const thumbs = document.getElementsByClassName("lightbox-thumb");
    for (let i = 0; i < thumbs.length; i++) {
      thumbs[i].classList.remove("active-thumb");
    }
    if(thumbs[index]) thumbs[index].classList.add("active-thumb");
  }
</script>
```
